documentation.text: @dev Helper to register a provider for testing.
@dev Helper to create a policy for testing.
@dev Helper to create a request for testing.

 @notice This should never revert - tested by Echidna.

@dev Invariant: Patient requests cannot exceed reasonable bounds.

devdoc.details: Echidna fuzz testing contract for Insurance properties.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

createPolicy(address).details: Helper to create a policy for testing.

createRequest(address,address).details: Helper to create a request for testing.

invariant_active_policy_has_provider().details: Invariant: Active policies must have valid provider.

invariant_finalized_must_be_verified().details: Invariant: A finalized request must have been verified first.

invariant_request_bounds().details: Invariant: Patient requests cannot exceed reasonable bounds.

invariant_verifier_consistency().details: Invariant: Verifier address can be set but never to zero once set.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

registerProvider(address).details: Helper to register a provider for testing.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.
